@@ -1369,7 +1369,7 @@
 {"id":"gt-tulx","title":"gt mq submit: creates task type instead of merge-request type","description":"## Problem

`gt mq submit` creates an issue with `type: task` but should be `type: merge-request`.

## Evidence

```
$ bd show gt-n508
gt-n508: Merge: gt-70b3
Status: open
Priority: P1
Type: task      <-- WRONG, should be merge-request
...
Description:
type: merge-request   <-- Correct type is in description, not in actual type field
```

## Impact

`gt mq list` shows empty queue because it queries for `type: merge-request`

## Fix

`gt mq submit` should set `--type merge-request` when creating the bead.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-18T21:57:37.905848-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-18T22:16:31.393114-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-18T22:16:31.393114-08:00"}
 {"id":"gt-tvos","title":"load-context","description":"Run gt prime and bd prime. Verify issue assignment.
Check inbox for any relevant messages.

Read the assigned issue (gt-test123) and understand the requirements.
Identify any blockers or missing information.","status":"tombstone","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-21T21:48:26.32141-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T14:12:42.239473-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-tvos","depends_on_id":"gt-i4lo","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-21T21:48:26.323129-08:00","created_by":"stevey"}],"deleted_at":"2025-12-25T14:12:42.239473-08:00","deleted_by":"daemon","delete_reason":"delete","original_type":"task"}
 {"id":"gt-tw1g","title":"Startup hook should validate attached molecule is still open","description":"When the SessionStart hook outputs attached_molecule from the handoff bead, it should check if that molecule is still open. If closed, it should:
1. Clear the stale attachment
2. Auto-spawn a fresh patrol molecule
3. Attach the new patrol

Currently it just outputs the stale reference without validation, leaving the Deacon confused about what to run.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2025-12-23T13:16:51.73028-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T21:01:40.884291-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T21:01:40.884291-08:00","close_reason":"Low priority bugs or cosmetic issues. Not blocking autonomous patrols."}
-{"id":"gt-twjr5","title":"Async Coordination Gates","description":"Agents wait for external events without polling.

## Problem
Agents cannot wait for external conditions (CI completion, human approval, timers) without wasteful polling or losing state on handoff.

## Requirements
- Gate issue type in beads (type=gate)
- bd gate create --await timer:5m / gh:run:123 / human:approve / mail:pattern
- Deacon evaluates pending gates each patrol cycle
- Agents park work on gate, resume when condition met
- Gate timeout and notification

## Gate Types
- timer:<duration> - Simple delay (5m, 1h, 24h)
- gh:run:<id> - GitHub Actions run completion
- gh:pr:<id> - PR merged/closed  
- human:<prompt> - Human approval required
- mail:<pattern> - Wait for mail matching pattern

## Success Criteria
- Agent can create gate and suspend work
- Deacon wakes agent when gate condition met
- Gates survive session cycling

Consolidates gt-31eg. Parallel work with no dependencies.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-25T20:46:07.930952-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T20:46:07.930952-08:00"}
